templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://support.birchliving.com/hc/en-us/articles/360052167694-What-are-the-different-mattress-sizes-and-dimensions

templates.name: What is a mattress pad and how is it used?
templates.content: The Organic Mattress Pad is skirted and fits over the surface of your mattress like a fitted sheet. It provides protection against spills, stains, and general wear and tear. Please note that the mattress pad is not waterproof.

templates.name: Does the Kids Natural Mattress work on bunk beds?
templates.content: We designed the Kids Natural Mattress with bunk beds in mind and limited the overall height of the mattress to 8 inches in order to be compatible with most bunk bed setups. We do highly recommend, though, that you consult the specific safety guidelines for your bunk bed to confirm whether it is compatible with an 8-inch mattress.

templates.name: How is my Birch Mattress shipped?
templates.content: Your Birch Mattress is gently compressed, rolled, and put in a box for easy shipping! The packaging dimensions are 42" x 19.5" x 19.5", and we ship via FedEx Ground direct from the manufacturer to your door. Hope it helps.

templates.name: Waterproof Protector vs. Organic Mattress Pad
templates.content:
Protecting your mattress can mean different things to different people. Some prefer the full confidence of a waterproof layer while others prioritize coverage against dirt and debris while maintaining the use of only natural and organic materials. 

That's why our bedding collection lets you decide what kind of mattress protection you prefer. You can read more about it here: https://birchliving.com/pages/birch-101-waterproof-protector-vs-organic-mattress-pad

templates.name: How do I clean the organic cotton mattress pad?
templates.content: Our mattress pad can be spot cleaned with a mild detergent and warm water. You can also machine wash it in a cold and gentle cycle. Tumble dry low and don't iron.

templates.name: How can I wash my sheets?
templates.content: The sheets can be washed on a cold, gentle cycle with like colors, no bleach. You can tumble dry on low and use warm iron as needed.

templates.name: How do I clean the Organic/Eco rest pillow?
templates.content: Our pillow can be spot cleaned with a mild detergent as needed. Please don't machine wash or dry.

templates.name: Does the duvet insert sleep warm?
templates.content: The duvet insert is actually designed as an "all-season" production combining the luxurious lightness and loft of down with the moisture-wicking, breathable, antibacterial, odor resistant, body temperature regulating properties of wool.

templates.name: Warranty policy
templates.content: You can take a look at our full warranty policy here: https://birchliving.com/pages/warranty

templates.name: Do you provide old mattress removal?
templates.content: Due to safety concerns regarding COVID-19, our nationwide In-home delivery and old mattress removal services have been suspended, however, in compliance with California state laws, we're happy to offer to remove it free of charge on any orders shipping to a California address. This free removal service includes the removal of any items being replaced by our product.

templates.name: What are the layers of the your natural mattress?
templates.content: Our natural mattress features an organic cotton cover, a fire retardant cover, an organic wool comfort layer, a pressure relief layer, a support layer, and a base layer.

templates.name: Does the Birch Mattress require a foundation?
templates.content: It's not required, however, a support system for your mattress is highly recommended. You can use a bunkie board with a box spring or any support system with firm, flat and thick slats. No matter which support system you choose, the slats should be no wider than 5'' apart as that could cause sagging and could potentially void your warranty. Check out our foundation here: https://birchliving.com/products/birch-foundation

templates.name: Does the organic pillow have a zipper?
templates.content: Yes, it has a zipper on one end.

templates.name: Do I need to use a duvet cover with the duvet insert?
templates.content: It's not absolutely necessary, however, it's recommended. A duvet cover will help protect the duvet insert against spills, stains, and dirt, and is more efficient to wash than the duvet insert itself.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at help@birchliving.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Can you ship to a PO Box/APO/FPO address?
templates.content: At this time, we're unable to provide shipping to these types of addresses per regulations with FedEx.

templates.name: Where is the latex sourced from?
templates.content: Our Talalay latex is all-natural and sourced from Southeast Asia.

templates.name: How long will the sheets/duvet cover/mattress protector/pad last?
templates.content: With normal use and regular washing, it will last for 5 years or longer.

templates.name: What is the 100 Night Sleep Trial?
templates.content: This is our guarantee that comes along with all of our products. If you're unhappy with the mattress for any reason, you can return it for a full refund within the 100-night trial period, after the 30-day break-in period.

templates.name: Where is the wool sourced from?
templates.content: The wool is sourced from New Zealand and it's 100% organic.

templates.name: Where is the cotton sourced from?
templates.content: Our cotton is 100% organic and it's spun in North Carolina.

templates.name: What’s the difference between Birch and Birch Luxe Natural Mattress?
templates.content:
They both have similar designs and materials, and both provide excellent pressure relief and durable support for your hips, shoulders, back, and stomach. However, the Birch Luxe does include a few key upgraded components such as an enhanced coil base with zoned lumbar support, full perimeter edge support, and an increased coil count to provide incredible support and durability!

You can learn more about the key differences here: https://support.birchliving.com/hc/en-us/articles/4410285509143-What-s-the-difference-between-Birch-and-Birch-Luxe-

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 917-540-5525 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on all domestic orders.

templates.name: Why does the inside of the organic pillow look like a plain white pillow?
templates.content: If you open the pillow, there's an organic cotton shell inside that's sewn shut. Because of this, the inside will look like a plain white pillow instead of the zipper opening up to the actual latex and wool material.

templates.name: Is the return process free?
templates.content: We will arrange for a pickup of your mattress and we will provide a prepaid FedEx label for any smaller items that you decide to return. If you decide to not keep your mattress, we will charge a pickup fee of $99, that will be withheld from your refund.

templates.name: How do I start a return/exchange?
templates.content: You can initiate the return process here: https://support.helixsleep.com/hc/en-us/requests/new

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: The natural mattress is currently shipping from our facility within 5-10 business days of your order, whereas the luxe mattress is shipping within 1-4 weeks with no-contact delivery. Items will ship separately and as each ships out from our facility, you will receive FedEx tracking and an estimated delivery date via email.

templates.name: Are the organic pillows hypoallergenic?
templates.content: Both wool and latex are for the most part naturally hypoallergenic. Natural latex isn't susceptible to molding and accumulating harsh microbes and it's also a natural barrier to dust mites and mildew. However, people can still be allergic to them so we can't say explicitly that the pillows are hypoallergenic.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at our partner showrooms here: https://birchliving.com/pages/partner-showrooms

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at help@birchliving.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Is the mattress pad waterproof?
templates.content: The mattress pad isn't waterproof so I'd recommend using our Waterproof Mattress Protector which includes a thin layer of polyurethane for complete waterproof protection. You can check it out here: https://birchliving.com/products/birch-waterproof-mattress-protector

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a referral program where you can give your friends $425 off at Birch, and you'll get $50 at Amazon when they make a purchase. Check it out here: https://birchliving.com/pages/referral

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: All mattresses are assembled in our Phoenix, Arizona facility and shipped directly to your door. We use source materials both domestically and internationally and assemble each mattress in our facility to give us complete control over quality.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://support.birchliving.com/hc/en-us/articles/1500005119061-What-is-the-Birch-return-policy-

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://support.birchliving.com/hc/en-us/articles/1500008539261-Does-Birch-offer-any-military-discount-teacher-student-or-first-responder-discount-

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at wholesale@birchliving.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Student discount
templates.content: You can learn more and apply for your discount here: https://birchliving.com/pages/discount-students

templates.name: How will the Birch Mattress feel? Soft or firm?
templates.content: The Birch Mattress was designed with a medium-firm feel. If you're looking for something softer, we offer a Plush Organic Mattress Topper that lays directly on top of your Birch to provide an extra soft layer.

templates.name: What are the different mattress sizes and dimensions?
templates.content:
All of our Mattresses are 11" tall. These are the dimensions: Twin: 39" x 75", Twin XL: 39" x 80", Full: 54" x 75", Queen: 60" x 80", King: 76" x 80" and California King: 72" x 84". 

Please note that, due to the handmade nature of our product, mattress dimensions can vary by up to 1" on any given side.

templates.name: What will the Luxe feel like?
templates.content: Like the Natural Mattress, the Luxe is designed with a medium-firm feel - not too firm, not too soft. The Birch Luxe includes a cotton matelassé Euro top for plush, breathable comfort on the surface of the mattress. The Birch Luxe also uses natural latex to provide great pressure relief for your hips and shoulders in side sleeping positions without offering too much sink into the surface of the mattress.

templates.name: Will the waterproof pillow protector sleep hot?
templates.content: Not at all! The Waterproof Pillow Protector is designed with an organic cotton cover that is naturally breathable.

templates.name: What is the Foundation made from?
templates.content: The Foundation is made from premium spruce, a kiln-dried hardwood that is designed to maximize strength and durability. Our spruce is sourced from suppliers across Canada and Europe. The cover on the Foundation is made from 100% organic cotton. It's designed to be highly breathable with a subtle stretch and soft touch.

templates.name: Does the Kids Natural Mattress need a foundation?
templates.content: Yes, the Kids Natural Mattress will require proper support in order to avoid dipping or sagging. We recommend using either a solid platform bed or a slatted foundation with no more than 5 inches between each slat. A traditional box spring is not recommended for use with this mattress. Customers with a traditional box spring can add either a bunkie board or sturdy plywood directly under the mattress for additional support.

templates.name: What happens to returned products?
templates.content: We do our best to donate lightly used products to charities and housing facilities. When we're unable to do so due to relevant laws or the state of the mattress, we enlist our removal partner to recycle the mattress and its materials responsibly.

templates.name: What is the difference between the mattress pad and mattress protector?
templates.content: The Organic Mattress Pad is 100% organic and provides natural protection against spills and stains without the use of polyurethane materials. The Waterproof Mattress Protector uses this polyurethane layer to provide waterproof protection.

templates.name: Is the mattress pad compatible with other mattress toppers?
templates.content: Yes! You can place the mattress pad over any mattress topper, including the Birch organic topper, for added protection. The mattress pad includes 16" pockets.

templates.name: When will I get my refund?
templates.content: Once your Birch product has been returned or picked up, a full refund will be issued. It usually takes 5-7 business days for the credit to be reflected back onto your original form of payment, or 3-5 days for Paypal, Katapult or Klarna.

templates.name: What is the Break-In Period?
templates.content: Our 100 Night Sleep Trial includes a required 30-day Break-In period for your mattress. Sleeping on a mattress that has been built to your sleeping needs and preferences is usually a new experience, so your body will need time to get used to a new sleep system. Just like a new pair of shoes, the materials in the mattress need to be physically broken in. It may feel stiffer than you'd expect in the first few weeks but will adjust as you sleep on it.

templates.name: How much does the Plush Organic Mattress Topper weigh?
templates.content: We carry all standard sizes for our topper and the weight will range from 23 to 47 pounds. The Twin is 23 lbs, the Twin XL is 25 lbs, the Full is 31 lbs, the Queen is 37 lbs, and the King/CA King is 47 lbs.

templates.name: Does the Duvet insert work with any Duvet cover?
templates.content: Yes! The Duvet insert can be used with any Duvet cover of the same size. Loops in all four corners of the Duvet insert make compatibility quick and easy.

templates.name: Does the mattress pad change the feel of my mattress?
templates.content: The Organic Mattress Pad will not noticeably alter the feel of your mattress. It's designed with a quilted surface and primarily serves as a durable layer of protection for your mattress.

templates.name: Is the Kids Natural Mattress eligible for Accidental Damage Coverage?
templates.content: Yes, we are excited to partner with Mulberry to offer Accidental Damage Coverage on the Kids Natural Mattress. This coverage is available as a 10-year plan and can be added to your order during the checkout process. You can learn more about Mulberry's Accidental Damage Coverage here: https://support.birchliving.com/hc/en-us/articles/360052170994-What-does-Mulberry-cover-

templates.name: What materials is the Duvet insert made from?
templates.content: The Duvet insert includes a 100% organic cotton shell in a natural color. It's designed with a 300 thread count for maximum breathability and comfort. The Duvet insert also includes a baffle box construction for an additional loft and four corner loops that tie to a Duvet cover.

templates.name: How thick is the latex layer in the topper?
templates.content: The Plush Organic Mattress Topper uses a layer of Talalay latex that is approximately 2 inches to provide great support and pressure relief. The topper also uses a layer of organic wool on top of the latex to provide additional plush comfort. The Plush Organic Mattress Topper adds a 2-inch comfort layer to the surface of any mattress.

templates.name: Why am I not seeing an option to check out using Katapult?
templates.content: Katapult is not offered in Minnesota, New Jersey, Wisconsin, or Wyoming. When trying to check out in any of these states, you will not have the option to use Zibby.

templates.name: What if my child is big for their age?
templates.content: The age ranges provided on both sides of the Kids Natural Mattress are meant only to offer guidance. Every child sleeps a bit differently and you know your child best! We encourage you and your child to test out both sides of the mattress to determine which side works best for them.

templates.name: What materials are used in the Kids Natural Mattress?
templates.content: The Kids Natural Mattress is a non-toxic mattress made with safe and certified organic, hypoallergenic materials. Its 2-sided design features elements from nature: organic cotton, organic wool, and natural latex. It also includes individually wrapped steel coils in the base of the mattress to provide support and durability.

templates.name: How can I wash my Duvet Cover?
templates.content: Your Duvet Cover can be washed on a cold, gentle cycle with like colors. You can tumble dry on low and use a warm iron as needed. Please do not use bleach with this product.

templates.name: What does Mulberry cover?
templates.content: Mulberry goes beyond the standard limited and manufacturer warranty by covering almost everything that can go wrong with the mattress in addition to any structural breakdowns. You can read more about it here: https://support.birchliving.com/hc/en-us/articles/360052170994-What-does-Mulberry-cover-

templates.name: Does the mattress pad sleep hot?
templates.content: No, the Organic Mattress Pad is designed with GOTS-certified 100% organic cotton for maximum breathability and a cool feel while you sleep. The mattress pad is made with a 300 thread count cotton sateen.

templates.name: What are the eco-rest pillows made of?
templates.content: The Eco-Rest Pillows are designed with a GOTS and Fair Trade certified organic cotton shell. The cotton shell includes 300 thread count for maximum breathability and wrinkle resistance. Each Eco-Rest Pillow is filled with 100% recycled materials, sustainably sourced and produced in the United States. The Eco-Rest Pillows are designed for a plush and supportive feel.

templates.name: Is the packaging recyclable?
templates.content:
The Birch mattress is shipped in a cardboard box that can be broken down and recycled through your local recycling collection program. The box is not needed for any potential returns and can be discarded as soon as you have opened and set up your mattress.

The mattress itself is wrapped in two layers of a Low-Density Polyethylene. This material is considered a #4 plastic for recycling purposes and can be recycled at select stores and recycling centers where soft plastics are collected.

templates.name: Does the Luxe include any safety and sustainability certifications?
templates.content: The Birch Luxe Natural Mattress is both GOTS and Greenguard Gold certified, ensuring it uses only organic materials, free from unnecessary chemicals, throughout the entire supply chain. The Birch Luxe also includes certifications from the Forest Stewardship Council and the eco-INSTITUT in addition to being Fair Trade Certified.

templates.name: Why is the no-slip band adhered to the exterior of my Organic Mattress Pad?
templates.content: The elastic no-slip band is adhered to the outside of the Organic Mattress Pad to ensure a snug fit around your mattress. The no-slip band is designed to grip the Foundation or support base beneath your mattress and keep both your mattress and Organic Mattress Pad in place.

templates.name: Is the Duvet Cover included with the purchase of a Duvet Insert?
templates.content: No, the Duvet Cover and Duvet Insert are sold separately.

templates.name: What is the weight limit on the Foundation?
templates.content: The Foundation can support up to 1,200 pounds.

templates.name: Should I ever flip my Mattress over?
templates.content: Please note that the Birch Mattress isn't designed to be flipped over. The ordering of the layers is critical to the performance and comfort of the mattress.

templates.name: I'm allergic to latex. Is that a problem?
templates.content: The majority of latex allergies are due to direct contact or inhalation of airborne latex particles. All of the latex used in the Birch Mattress is encased. Although skin-to-latex does not occur during normal use, we suggest you consult your allergist prior to purchase if you are uncertain.

templates.name: How long can I keep my Mattress in the box?
templates.content: We recommend that you don't keep your Birch Mattress in its original packaging for more than four weeks after receiving your mattress. Spending too much time in the packaging can affect the resilience of the mattress, preventing it from re-gaining its full shape. It's important to note that your 100 Night Sleep Trial begins on the day of arrival, so you won't want to keep it boxed up for too long!

templates.name: Should I ever rotate my Mattress?
templates.content: Our Mattresses are built to last and don't need to be rotated. However, you are welcome to if you'd like!

templates.name: Can I wash my Duvet insert?
templates.content: The Duvet insert can be washed on a cold, gentle cycle with mild detergent. You can tumble dry on low. We recommend using dryer balls. You can also professionally dry clean or spot clean with a mild detergent for a focused clean. Please do not use bleach with this product.

templates.name: Can I request a specific delivery date?
templates.content: We cannot provide exact shipment details until the package has been shipped. If you have specific delivery needs, we recommend registering for FedEx' Delivery Manager, a service that gives you control over your delivery arrival dates. You can reschedule delivery times, set notifications, and change your address. Once you've registered, you can manage the delivery right from the tracking page.

templates.name: Will all of my items ship together?
templates.content: All of our products ship separately and will be delivered within a few days of each other. Once each item ships, you'll receive a FedEx tracking number via email.

templates.name: How is the Foundation assembled?
templates.content: The Foundation includes a tool-free assembly. The end rails on both sides of the foundation can be fastened to the side rails and center rail (if applicable) using the bolts, washers, and wing nuts. The slats can be placed on top of the foundation, aligned with pre-drilled holes and fastened into place by the plastic rivets provided.

templates.name: What materials are included in the Duvet insert fill?
templates.content: The Duvet insert includes 70% Down fill and 30% wool. The Down used for this product is responsibility sourced and Responsible Down Standard certified. Our wool is sourced from New Zealand and South Africa.

templates.name: If I return my mattress, will it be junked?
templates.content: We do our best to ensure that all returned mattresses and ancillary products are either donated or recycled. We have a network of partners nationwide that help us donate or recycle as many products as possible.

templates.name: What materials are in the Plush Organic Mattress Topper?
templates.content: Like our Birch Mattress, the Plush Organic Mattress Topper is made of the same materials, without the spring coils. The topper includes natural Talalay latex and organic wool. This makes it a great option to add a 2-inch comfort layer to any mattress.

templates.name: What is the Duvet Cover made from?
templates.content: The Duvet Cover is made from 100% organic cotton and includes a 320 thread count. The Duvet Cover includes four corner ties that will attach to four corner loops included with the Birch Duvet Insert. The Duvet Cover includes a hidden button enclosure for easy access to the Duvet Insert.

templates.name: Why is Katapult charging me $45?
templates.content: Katapult charges an application fee of $45 for all leases. This fee is non-refundable and must be paid for at the time your order is placed.

templates.name: What materials are the sheets made from?
templates.content: The sheets are made from 100% organic cotton and include a 320 thread count with a sateen weave.

templates.name: What is a sateen weave?
templates.content: This weaving technique provides a luxurious feel while maintaining breathability and coolness. The sheets have a luxurious, silky feel and will be naturally wrinkle resistant. Your sheets will get softer with each wash!

templates.name: Does the Mattress work with adjustable bases?
templates.content: Yes! The Birch Mattress should work with any adjustable base.

templates.name: What materials are used in a Birch mattress?
templates.content: Our mission is to build Birch products with materials sourced from nature. The four key ingredients are wool, natural latex, cotton, and steel. You can find more information here: https://birchliving.com/pages/our-materials

templates.name: How does the waterproof pillow protector work?
templates.content: The Waterproof Pillow Protector is designed with a thin polyurethane-based waterproof film inside an organic cotton external cover to provide waterproofing protection for your pillow. Just unzip the Pillow Protector and slide it over the end of your pillow.

templates.name: Is the Kids Natural Mattress Safe?
templates.content: Safety is our absolute priority with the Kids Natural Mattress. This mattress relies on organic wool as a natural fire retardant and is free from any dangerous chemicals, harmful gasses, formaldehyde, fiberglass, and polyurethane foams. Like all Birch Natural Mattresses, it is made in the USA and has been certified safe, organic, and low emission by the strictest global standards.

templates.name: Is the mattress protector waterproof?
templates.content: Yes! The mattress protector is 100% waterproof. This product uses a thin layer of polyurethane between two layers of 100% organic, GOTS-certified jersey knit cotton.

templates.name: What sizes are offered for the Kids Natural Mattress?
templates.content: The Kids Natural Mattress is available in Twin (39" W x 75" L) and Full (54" W x 75" L) sizes. In both sizes, the mattress is approximately 8 inches tall.

templates.name: Why is the Kids Natural Mattress the right choice for my child?
templates.content: The Kids Natural Mattress is thoughtfully designed with your child's safety as the number one priority. We have combined natural and organic materials that are free from any chemicals or harmful odors to create a 2-sided mattress with firmness levels tailored to your child's age and development. The firmer side offers essential support for children ages 3-7 while the softer side offers a bit more plush comfort for older children, ages 8-12.

templates.name: What are the dimensions of standard and king organic pillows?
templates.content: Our standard size Organic Pillow measures 20" x 28" x 2". It will fit standard and queen size pillowcases. Our king size Organic Pillow measures 20" x 36" x 2".

templates.name: Can I request a shipping method other than FedEx?
templates.content: Please note that all Birch products are shipped via FedEx Ground. I'm afraid we don't have the ability to offer alternative shipping methods at this time.

templates.name: Do I need to be home to receive the package?
templates.content: All of our packages are sent via FedEx Ground without the need for signature confirmation. However, your FedEx driver reserves the right to hold the package until a signature is obtained in the event they are not confident that they can release your package safely.

templates.name: How are the age ranges for the two sides of the Kids Natural Mattress determined?
templates.content: In developing the Birch Kids Natural Mattress, we followed industry guidance around the support required for young sleepers as they grow. The firmer side of our mattress provides a bit more support for kids who are transitioning from a crib mattress. As kids grow and develop the softer side offers a bit more plush comfort. The age ranges provided for the Kids Natural Mattress are designed as suggestions. We recommend assessing your child's size and sleep habits to determine which side of the mattress they should use.

templates.name: Can I wash my Plush Organic Mattress Topper?
templates.content: The natural latex and wool in our Plush Organic Mattress Topper cannot be machine washed. We recommend only spot cleaning it with mild detergent.

templates.name: Is the waterproof pillow protector machine washable?
templates.content: The Waterproof Pillow Protector can be machine washed on its own using a cold, gentle wash cycle. Dry on low heat and avoid using an iron on this product. The Pillow Protector can also be spot cleaned as needed. For all cleanings, we recommend using a mild detergent and avoiding the use of any bleach.

templates.name: How does the mattress protector fit on my mattress?
templates.content: The mattress protector is skirted and will fit over your mattress like a fitted sheet. It includes 16" pockets to work great with any size mattress.

templates.name: How much space is between each slat on the Foundation?
templates.content: The Foundation includes 12 slats that are 3⁄4 thick with approximately 5 inches between each slat.

templates.name: What materials are used in the Organic Pillow?
templates.content: The Organic Pillow is made with an organic cotton shell. It contains 70% natural latex and 30% organic wool clusters.

templates.name: Does the mattress protector sleep hot?
templates.content: No, the mattress protector is made with 100% GOTS certified cotton to maximize airflow and breathability and keep you cool while you sleep.

templates.name: Are Canadian orders processed in CAD or USD?
templates.content: All orders through the Birch website are processed in USD and will be converted to CAD by your bank or card issuer. There is no convertor tool available on the Birch site, so all products will be displayed in USD.

templates.name: Does the Luxe work with adjustable bases?
templates.content: Yes! The Luxe is designed with individually wrapped steel coils in the base of the mattress, giving it the ability to raise and lower without sacrificing any support or durability.

templates.name: What's the weight limit for the Kids Natural Mattress?
templates.content: The Kids Natural Mattress is designed with durable steel coils to provide long-lasting support for weights up to 500 pounds.

templates.name: Does you offer tax exemption?
templates.content: Yes! We honor all certified state and federal tax exemptions. We ask that you provide any relevant documentation to our team at help@birchliving.com for review prior to your purchase so we can apply tax exempt status to your account.

templates.name: What’s included in a sheet set?
templates.content: Our Sheet Sets include 1 fitted sheet, 1 flat sheet, and 2 pillowcases. Twin/Twin XL/Full/Queen sheets include a standard-size pillowcase and King/CA King sets include a king-size pillowcase. Please note that Twin/Twin XL sheet sets include one pillowcase.

templates.name: Can I wash the mattress protector?
templates.content:
You can wash your mattress protector with mild detergent and a gentle cycle. The jersey knit will shrink a tiny bit to hug your Birch Mattress perfectly, with or without a topper. Dry on a low tumble cycle. Please do not use bleach with this product.

Your mattress protector can also be spot cleaned with warm water and a mild detergent.

templates.name: Can I use a mattress protector with the Kids Natural Mattress?
templates.content: At 8 inches tall, the Kids Natural Mattress is a bit smaller than the Birch and Birch Luxe Natural Mattress, meaning the Waterproof Mattress Protector and Organic Mattress Pad will fit more loosely on this mattress. You are welcome to purchase either the Waterproof Mattress Protector or the Organic Mattress Pad with your Kids Natural Mattress, but for optimal protection, we recommend adding the Accidental Damage Coverage to your order.

templates.name: Will my mattress be picked up from inside my home?
templates.content:
We are happy to offer old mattress removal free of charge on any orders shipping to a California address. This free old mattress removal service includes the removal of any items being replaced by a Birch product. For example, an order containing a Birch mattress and a Birch Foundation will be eligible for the removal of one mattress and one foundation or box spring.

California customers will receive an email once your Birch products have shipped asking if you would like to opt in and schedule your old mattress removal.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: The best way to check if you can cancel or edit your order is to email our support team directly at help@birchliving.com. They'll be more than happy to look into this for you!

templates.name: Do you offer financing or credit?
templates.content: You can find our financing options here: https://birchliving.com/pages/financing

templates.name: Edit "What’s the difference between Birch and Birch Luxe Natural Mattress?" template
templates.content: They both have similar designs and materials, providing excellent support. The Birch Luxe includes upgraded components like enhanced coil base, zoned lumbar support, and increased coil count. You can access more details here: https://birchliving.attn.tv/aiic8k6Y1a-i

templates.name: Order status / order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://status.helixsleep.com

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/livebirch and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/livebirch

templates.name: Do you offer a trade program?
templates.content:
Yes we do! We're proud to work with interior designers and architects to offer our products at an exclusive 30% discount. You can learn more and submit your application here: http://go.helixsleep.com/trade 

For any additional questions, feel free to reach out to our team directly at trade@helixsleep.com.
